_fixture_purpose: Models the documented silent-failure mode of check_portfolio_redundancy on sector-concentrated portfolios. The tool returns has_issues=false with empty sector_concentration and a 'well-diversified' summary even when the portfolio is clearly concentrated. Sanity-check gates in portfolio-builder Step 4, portfolio-builder Step 6 fallback, and halal-screen Step 2 protect against this mode. See PHASE_0_TEST_REPORT (notes/load-house-view) for the original empirical observation on an 86%-financials portfolio.
_replay_context: Synthetic — derived from observed live-server behavior, not a captured response. Update if/when upstream Parallax fixes the empty-payload bug.
